videos.title: Tech boss ARRESTED for allegedly aiding Iran #shorts #us #news #foxnews
videos.author: Fox News
videos.description:
Federal authorities arrested dual U.S.-Iranian citizen Jamshid Ghomi and raided his home following allegations that he ran a massive, decade-long ring to smuggle American computer networking hardware to Iran's military and nuclear operations.
